add-semi-transparent-logo-stamp-to-first.title: Add Semi-Transparent Logo Stamp to First PDF Page
add-semi-transparent-logo-stamp-to-first.description: Demonstrates how to place a semi-transparent image stamp (logo) at the center of the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-stamp-to-pdf-page.title: Add Image Stamp to PDF Page with Quality and Opacity
add-image-stamp-to-pdf-page.description: Shows how to place an image stamp on the second page of a PDF, setting the stamp to 100 % quality and 0.8 opacity using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-stamp-alt-text-page-3.title: Add Image Stamp with Alt Text to PDF Page 3
add-image-stamp-alt-text-page-3.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating an ImageStamp with alternative text for accessibility, positioning it, and adding it to the third page before saving the document.

add-image-background-floatingbox-page-4.title: Add Image Background to Page Using FloatingBox
add-image-background-floatingbox-page-4.description: Demonstrates how to place an image as a background inside a FloatingBox that covers the entire fourth page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

apply-image-stamp-to-all-pdf-pages.title: Apply Image Stamp to All PDF Pages
apply-image-stamp-to-all-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, create an ImageStamp, and apply it to every page using a foreach loop before saving the document.

rotate-image-stamp-in-pdf.title: Rotate Image Stamp and Add to PDF
rotate-image-stamp-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating an ImageStamp, rotating it 45 degrees, and placing it on a page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-stamp-top-right-corner.title: Add Image Stamp to Top‑Right Corner of PDF
add-image-stamp-top-right-corner.description: Shows how to place an image stamp (e.g., a logo) in the top‑right corner of every page of a PDF with configurable margin offsets using Aspose.Pdf.

scale-image-stamp-to-full-page-width.title: Scale Image Stamp to Full Page Width in PDF
scale-image-stamp-to-full-page-width.description: Shows how to add an image stamp to every page of a PDF, scaling it to match the page width while keeping the original aspect ratio.

add-image-stamp-from-memory-stream.title: Add Image Stamp from Memory Stream to PDF
add-image-stamp-from-memory-stream.description: Demonstrates how to load an image into a MemoryStream and apply it as an ImageStamp to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-low-quality-image-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add Low‑Quality Image Stamp to PDF Pages
add-low-quality-image-stamp-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to apply an image stamp with reduced quality (10 %) to all pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, improving performance for large documents.

add-fully-opaque-image-stamp-watermark.title: Add Fully Opaque Image Stamp Watermark to PDF
add-fully-opaque-image-stamp-watermark.description: Shows how to load a PDF, create an ImageStamp from a PNG, set its opacity to 1.0, center it, and apply it to every page as a visible watermark.

add-diagonal-image-watermark-to-pdf.title: Add Diagonal Image Watermark to PDF Pages
add-diagonal-image-watermark-to-pdf.description: Shows how to place a rotated image stamp as a diagonal, semi‑transparent watermark on each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-upside-down-image-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add Upside-Down Image Stamp to PDF
add-upside-down-image-stamp-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to place an image stamp rotated 180° (upside‑down) on a PDF page using Aspose.Pdf.

place-image-stamp-custom-coordinates.title: Place Image Stamp at Custom Coordinates in PDF
place-image-stamp-custom-coordinates.description: Shows how to add an image stamp to a PDF page at specific X and Y coordinates, with custom size and opacity, using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-stamp-percentage-position.title: Add Image Stamp with Percentage Positioning
add-image-stamp-percentage-position.description: Demonstrates how to place an image stamp on each PDF page using offsets expressed as percentages of the page width and height.

fit-image-stamp-within-rectangle.title: Fit Image Stamp Within Rectangle in PDF
fit-image-stamp-within-rectangle.description: Shows how to load a PDF, define a target rectangle, and add an image stamp that automatically scales and centers to fit the rectangle while preserving its aspect ratio, then save the document.

add-fixed-size-image-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add Fixed-Size Image Stamp to PDF Pages
add-fixed-size-image-stamp-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to place a fixed-dimension image stamp on every page of a PDF, independent of page size, using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-stamp-with-unicode-alt-text.title: Add Image Stamp with Unicode Alternative Text to PDF
add-image-stamp-with-unicode-alt-text.description: Demonstrates how to place an image stamp on a PDF page and assign multilingual Unicode alternative text for accessibility using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-stamp-with-alt-text-pdfa1b.title: Add Image Stamp with Alternative Text for PDF/A‑1b Output
add-image-stamp-with-alt-text-pdfa1b.description: Demonstrates adding an image stamp with alternative (alt) text to each page of a PDF and converting the document to PDF/A‑1b compliance.

add-image-stamp-to-encrypted-pdf.title: Add Image Stamp to Encrypted PDF
add-image-stamp-to-encrypted-pdf.description: Shows how to open an encrypted PDF with a password, apply an image stamp to every page, and save the document while preserving its encryption.

add-image-stamp-to-signed-pdf.title: Add Image Stamp to Signed PDF without Invalidating Signature
add-image-stamp-to-signed-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a digitally signed PDF, adding a semi‑transparent image stamp to the first page, and saving the document using Aspose.PDF's incremental‑update mode so the existing signature remains valid.

add-image-stamp-preserve-annotations.title: Add Image Stamp to PDF While Preserving Annotations
add-image-stamp-preserve-annotations.description: Demonstrates loading an existing PDF, creating an image stamp with alignment and opacity, adding it to a page, and saving the document while keeping all original annotations intact.

add-image-stamp-to-pdf-preserve-form-fie.title: Add Image Stamp to PDF While Preserving Form Fields
add-image-stamp-to-pdf-preserve-form-fie.description: Loads a PDF containing form fields, creates a semi‑transparent ImageStamp from a PNG, positions it in the top‑right corner, adds the stamp to every page, and saves the result while keeping the form fields interactive.

add-image-stamp-and-flatten-annotations.title: Add Image Stamp and Flatten Annotations to Create Read‑Only PDF
add-image-stamp-and-flatten-annotations.description: Loads a PDF, adds an image stamp to the first page, flattens all annotations so they become part of the page content, and saves the result as a read‑only PDF.

add-image-stamp-preserve-bookmarks.title: Add Image Stamp While Preserving Bookmarks
add-image-stamp-preserve-bookmarks.description: Shows how to add an image stamp to every page of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf while keeping the original bookmarks and document outline unchanged.

add-image-stamp-preserve-page-labels.title: Add Image Stamp to PDF While Preserving Page Labels
add-image-stamp-preserve-page-labels.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, create an ImageStamp, place it on every page, and save the document while keeping existing page labels unchanged.

add-image-stamp-preserve-xmp-metadata.title: Add Image Stamp While Preserving XMP Metadata
add-image-stamp-preserve-xmp-metadata.description: Shows how to place an image stamp on every page of a PDF and keep the original XMP metadata intact using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-stamp-preserve-embedded-files.title: Add Image Stamp While Preserving Embedded Files
add-image-stamp-preserve-embedded-files.description: Demonstrates how to apply an image stamp to every page of a PDF and keep any embedded files intact using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-stamp-preserve-javascript.title: Add Image Stamp to PDF While Preserving JavaScript Actions
add-image-stamp-preserve-javascript.description: Demonstrates how to place a semi‑transparent image stamp on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and keep any existing JavaScript actions intact.

add-image-stamp-preserve-acroform.title: Add Image Stamp While Preserving AcroForm Fields
add-image-stamp-preserve-acroform.description: Shows how to load a PDF, apply an image stamp to every page, and save the document while keeping existing AcroForm fields unchanged.

add-custom-text-stamp-to-first-page.title: Add Custom Text Stamp to First PDF Page
add-custom-text-stamp-to-first-page.description: Shows how to place a text stamp with a custom font, size, and blue color on the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-auto-adjusting-text-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add Auto-Adjusting Text Stamp to PDF Pages
add-auto-adjusting-text-stamp-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a text stamp to each page of a PDF and automatically adjust its font size to fit a defined rectangle using Aspose.Pdf.

add-outlined-text-stamp.title: Add Outlined Text Stamp to PDF
add-outlined-text-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to place a text stamp on a PDF page using the StrokeText rendering mode to create outlined (stroke‑only) text with Aspose.Pdf.

add-bold-outlined-text-stamp.title: Add Bold Outlined Text Stamp to PDF
add-bold-outlined-text-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to place a centered text stamp with a bold font to simulate an outlined (fill‑stroke) effect on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

bottom-left-text-stamp-with-margin.title: Bottom‑Left Text Stamp with 10‑Point Margin
bottom-left-text-stamp-with-margin.description: Demonstrates adding a text stamp to a PDF and aligning it to the bottom‑left corner with a 10‑point margin using Aspose.Pdf.

add-rotated-text-watermark.title: Add Rotated Text Watermark to PDF
add-rotated-text-watermark.description: Demonstrates creating a TextStamp, rotating it 30 degrees, styling it, and applying it to every page of a PDF as a slanted watermark.

add-confidential-text-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add Confidential Text Stamp with Opacity to PDF
add-confidential-text-stamp-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF, creating a TextStamp with 0.6 opacity, and applying it to every page before saving the document.

add-text-stamp-with-background-box.title: Add Text Stamp with Background Box to PDF
add-text-stamp-with-background-box.description: Demonstrates how to place a semi‑transparent text stamp with a colored background box on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-multi-line-text-stamp-custom-line-sp.title: Add Multi-Line Text Stamp with Custom Line Spacing
add-multi-line-text-stamp-custom-line-sp.description: Demonstrates how to add a multi-line disclaimer text stamp to each page of a PDF and control the line spacing using Aspose.Pdf.

add-rtl-text-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add RTL Text Stamp to PDF Document
add-rtl-text-stamp-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to add a right‑to‑left Arabic or Hebrew text stamp to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-full-page-image-watermark-to-pdf.title: Add Full-Page Image Watermark to PDF
add-full-page-image-watermark-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to apply an image stamp as a full‑page background watermark on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-diagonal-text-stamp-watermark.title: Add Diagonal Text Stamp Watermark to PDF
add-diagonal-text-stamp-watermark.description: Demonstrates how to apply a semi‑transparent, 45‑degree rotated text stamp as a diagonal watermark on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-stamp-as-background-to-pdf.title: Add Image Stamp as Background to PDF
add-image-stamp-as-background-to-pdf.description: Shows how to place an image stamp behind the content of each page in a PDF by setting the ImageStamp's Background property to true using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-stamp-with-opacity-to-pdf-page.title: Add Image Stamp with Opacity to PDF Pages
add-image-stamp-with-opacity-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to overlay an image stamp with 40% opacity on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-rotated-image-stamp-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Rotated Image Stamp to PDF Pages
add-rotated-image-stamp-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to place an image stamp on each PDF page and rotate it 90 degrees to match portrait‑to‑landscape orientation using Aspose.Pdf.

add-custom-page-stamp-to-pdf.title: Add Custom Page Stamp with Specific Size and Position
add-custom-page-stamp-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a PdfPageStamp, set custom width, height, and placement coordinates, and apply it to a specific page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-page-stamp-to-specific-pdf-pages.title: Add Page Stamp to Specific PDF Pages
add-page-stamp-to-specific-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to apply a PDF page stamp to a range of pages (5‑10) using Aspose.Pdf, including opacity and background settings.

add-text-stamp-to-all-pdf-pages.title: Add Text Stamp to All PDF Pages
add-text-stamp-to-all-pdf-pages.description: The example loads a PDF, creates a centered semi‑transparent red "CONFIDENTIAL" TextStamp, applies it to every page by iterating through the document, and saves the stamped PDF.

create-page-stamp-from-pdf-template.title: Create Page Stamp from PDF Template
create-page-stamp-from-pdf-template.description: Demonstrates how to use a page from an existing PDF as a stamp template and apply it to every page of another PDF document.

apply-pdf-page-background-stamp.title: Apply PDF Page as Background Stamp
apply-pdf-page-background-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to use a page from another PDF as a background stamp on each page of a target PDF using Aspose.Pdf.
